onCreateCommand.firewall-deps: OP_ARCH=$(dpkg --print-architecture) && curl -sS https://downloads.1password.com/linux/keys/1password.asc | sudo gpg --yes --dearmor --output /usr/share/keyrings/1password-archive-keyring.gpg && echo "deb [arch=${OP_ARCH} signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/1password-archive-keyring.gpg] https://downloads.1password.com/linux/debian/${OP_ARCH} stable main" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/1password.list && sudo DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get update && sudo DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get -o Dpkg::Options::=--force-confold install -y iptables ipset python3-yaml dnsutils dnsmasq socat tmux fzf 1password-cli golang-go && sudo mkdir -p /etc/dnsmasq.d && sudo sh -c '> /etc/dnsmasq.conf'
onCreateCommand.setup: sudo groupadd claw-wrap 2>/dev/null || true && sudo groupadd claw-wrap-exec 2>/dev/null || true && sudo useradd -r -g claw-wrap -s /usr/sbin/nologin -M claw-wrap 2>/dev/null || true && sudo usermod -a -G claw-wrap-exec claw-wrap 2>/dev/null || true && sudo usermod -a -G claw-wrap vscode 2>/dev/null || true && sudo mkdir -p /var/log/vibeshield /opt/vibeshield/defaults /opt/vibeshield/bin /opt/vibeshield/state && sudo chmod 775 /var/log/vibeshield && sudo chown root:vscode /var/log/vibeshield && sudo chmod 755 /opt/vibeshield/state && sudo chown root:root /opt/vibeshield/state && mkdir -p /home/vscode/.local/share/zsh && sudo cp .devcontainer/emergency-open.sh /opt/vibeshield/bin/emergency-open.sh && sudo chmod +x /opt/vibeshield/bin/emergency-open.sh && sudo ln -sf /opt/vibeshield/bin/emergency-open.sh /usr/local/bin/vibeshield-emergency-open && sudo cp .devcontainer/network/reload-firewall.sh /opt/vibeshield/bin/reload-firewall && sudo chmod +x /opt/vibeshield/bin/reload-firewall && sudo ln -sf /opt/vibeshield/bin/reload-firewall /usr/local/bin/reload-firewall && sudo cp .devcontainer/network/apply-firewall.sh /opt/vibeshield/bin/apply-firewall && sudo chmod +x /opt/vibeshield/bin/apply-firewall && sudo cp .devcontainer/network/firewall.py /opt/vibeshield/bin/firewall.py && sudo cp .devcontainer/network/refresh-dns.sh /opt/vibeshield/bin/refresh-dns.sh && sudo chmod +x /opt/vibeshield/bin/refresh-dns.sh && sudo cp .devcontainer/network/health-check.sh /opt/vibeshield/bin/health-check.sh && sudo chmod +x /opt/vibeshield/bin/health-check.sh && sudo cp .devcontainer/network/config.defaults.yaml /opt/vibeshield/bin/config.defaults.yaml && sudo cp .devcontainer/sync-permissions.py /opt/vibeshield/sync-permissions.py && sudo chmod +x /opt/vibeshield/sync-permissions.py && sudo cp .devcontainer/vibeshield-sudoers /etc/sudoers.d/vibeshield && sudo chmod 440 /etc/sudoers.d/vibeshield && sudo chown -R root:root .devcontainer/network && sudo chmod 755 .devcontainer/network && sudo find .devcontainer/network -maxdepth 1 -type f -exec chmod 644 {} + && sudo chown root:root .devcontainer/vibeshield-sudoers .devcontainer/devcontainer.json && sudo chmod 644 .devcontainer/vibeshield-sudoers .devcontainer/devcontainer.json && sudo find / -xdev -perm -4000 -type f ! -path /usr/bin/sudo -exec chmod u-s {} + && sudo mount -o remount,hidepid=2 /proc 2>/dev/null || true && sudo mkdir -p /opt/vibeshield/hooks && sudo git config --system core.hooksPath /opt/vibeshield/hooks
onCreateCommand.python-tools: sudo install -d -o vscode -g vscode /home/vscode/.local/bin && curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh
onCreateCommand.lsp-servers: npm install -g typescript-language-server typescript pyright && curl -L https://github.com/rust-lang/rust-analyzer/releases/latest/download/rust-analyzer-$(uname -m)-unknown-linux-gnu.gz | gunzip > /tmp/rust-analyzer && chmod +x /tmp/rust-analyzer && sudo mv /tmp/rust-analyzer /usr/local/bin/rust-analyzer
onCreateCommand.lsp-gopls: while ! command -v go >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; done && GOPATH=/home/vscode/go go install golang.org/x/tools/gopls@latest && sudo ln -sf /home/vscode/go/bin/gopls /usr/local/bin/gopls
onCreateCommand.ralphex: ARCH=$(uname -m | sed 's/x86_64/amd64/;s/aarch64/arm64/') && LATEST=$(curl -sI https://github.com/umputun/ralphex/releases/latest | grep -i ^location: | sed 's|.*/v||;s/[[:space:]]*$//') && if [ -z "${LATEST}" ]; then echo 'WARNING: could not detect ralphex version (optional)'; exit 0; fi && curl -sL https://github.com/umputun/ralphex/releases/download/v${LATEST}/ralphex_${LATEST}_linux_${ARCH}.tar.gz | tar -xzf - -C /tmp ralphex && sudo mv /tmp/ralphex /usr/local/bin/ralphex && ralphex --help >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'ralphex installed' || echo 'WARNING: ralphex install failed (optional)'
onCreateCommand.codex: npm install -g @openai/codex 2>/dev/null && codex --version && echo 'codex installed' || echo 'WARNING: codex install failed (optional)'
onCreateCommand.swift: ARCH=$(uname -m | sed 's/x86_64/x86_64/;s/aarch64/aarch64/') && curl -sL https://download.swift.org/swift-6.1-release/ubuntu2404/swift-6.1-RELEASE/swift-6.1-RELEASE-ubuntu24.04-${ARCH}.tar.gz | sudo tar xz -C /opt && sudo ln -sf /opt/swift-6.1-RELEASE-ubuntu24.04-${ARCH}/usr/bin/swift /usr/local/bin/swift && sudo ln -sf /opt/swift-6.1-RELEASE-ubuntu24.04-${ARCH}/usr/bin/sourcekit-lsp /usr/local/bin/sourcekit-lsp && swift --version && echo 'swift 6.1 installed' || echo 'WARNING: swift install failed (optional)'
